title: Thoughts and Things 3/8/24
html:
Post-Murphy's-on-the-River dinner with sam solum: the butter connection wasn't there. Yahir realizes intellectual talks aren't the right register with her ("her brain ridges haven't developed this way") and needs to lead with making her feel important. Same day she opens his snap without responding, then a deflating high-five sidewalk encounter. The erectile confidence question persists — considering supplements but resisting lola sleep pill pattern dependence.

TL;DR

  • sam solum dinner at Murphy's on the River — flat connection, intellectual register misfires.
  • Snap/sidewalk-high-five sequence — the "near-call-everything-off" moment that defines the relationship's drift.
  • Self-frame inconsistency: sometimes "my girl," sometimes "girl I'm pursuing off snapchat" — Yahir's own answer is "I don't know."
  • Alcohol-as-kickstarter pattern noted — needed to loosen both their gears.
  • erectile confidence — considering supplements but flagging the lola sleep pill pattern dependency risk.

sam solum · erectile confidence · lola sleep pill pattern · breathwork · corvallis
